fields.label: URL
fields.description: The URL of the Atlassian Statuspage, including `https://` and without trailing `/`

groups.title: Connection
groups.description: Provide information to connect to the data source

instructions.msg: Atlassian Statuspage configuration is stored under a service-keyed jsonData shape: jsonData.variables.<name> holds connection variables. There is a single service with id 'atlassianstatuspage'. This datasource queries the public Statuspage API and requires no authentication, so there are no secureJsonData secrets.
There is no authentication. The only configuration is the Statuspage URL. Minimal working payload: {"jsonData":{"variables":{"url":"https://www.githubstatus.com"}}}.

Connection: the API base URL is built from the 'url' variable as {url}/api/v2. Set jsonData.variables.url to the Statuspage URL including https:// and without a trailing slash. The single server is fixed, so no server selector is shown.
